name: Pizza Hut Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast over warm water and stir in the sugar.
2. Let stand about 5 minutes or until very bubbly.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients with about half of the flour, beating to a smooth batter.
4. Beat in the yeast mixture and then mix with a sturdy spoon until you can toss it lightly on a floured surface and knead until it feels elastic.
5. The kneading may require about 2/3 cup additional flour, which you will coat your hand with as you knead the dough. Don't let the dough become too stiff or stick to your hands.
6. Place in a large plastic food bag, sprayed inside with Pam or wiped with oil. Place the ball of kneaded dough in this to rise until doubled.
7. Ensure the plastic bag is large enough that it will permit the dough to double without splitting the bag. A warm, sunny spot on the table or kitchen counter helps it raise quickly. If it's summertime, place the bag of dough (with open end sealed tightly with tape) in your car with windows up.
8. When dough has doubled, punch it down and shape it to fit two 15-inch round pizza pans that have been greased and dusted with cornmeal.
9. Add the sauce and topping ingredients exactly in the order listed above, spreading each ingredient evenly over the dough.
10. Let rise about 20 minutes in a warm place and then bake at 450°F for about 20 to 25 minutes, putting one pizza at a time on the center rack of the preheated oven.
11. If you don't want a full pizza and can only handle one, wrap the second pizza in foil or plastic and seal it with tape to lock out all air. Freeze it before the last rise.
12. After letting it thaw for 30 minutes, bake as directed above.
